note: Dedicated dashboard health agent started per Founder spec. Initial cycle scope: dashboard.html + amendments.html + proposals.html + escalations.html + activity.html + token-usage.html + discussion-bubbles.html + design-system.html + index.html. Excludes main-flows.html (3rd parallel agent).

summary: Dashboard-not-updating-per-commit root cause: Git core.hooksPath = .husky/_ (Husky redirect). AMD-019 hook at .git/hooks/post-commit was bypassed silently — Husky trampoline looks for .husky/post-commit which did not exist. Local dashboard mtime lagged latest commit by 5-6 minutes (94e4340 + 66a6e19 produced no regen output). The fresh-per-commit pipeline has been dead since AMD-019 install.

Installed .husky/post-commit (chmod +x). Runs regen subset (excludes regen-main-flows.py per 3rd-agent scope split). Includes AMD-020 Class A auto-clean restricted to dashboard regen output (docs/reports/dashboard|amendments|proposals|escalations|activity|token-usage|discussion-bubbles|design-system|index.html + .claude/state/telemetry/aggregates). Excludes docs/reports/main-flows.html + .claude/state/main-flows-v2/ + .claude/state/telemetry/events (events handled by watcher allowlist already).
